name: buselligence
description: The Buselligence Project — open-source AI runtime by Salestrics Inc. (MIT). Buselligence™ is a trademark of Salestrics Inc.
author: Salestrics Inc.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix client && npm run build --prefix server && npm run build --prefix cli
scripts.setup: node scripts/ensure-env.js && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix cli && npm run db:migrate --prefix server && npm run db:seed --prefix server
scripts.verify: npm run test --prefix server && npm run test:e2e
